sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time_intervals (event_date Date, duration IntervalSecond) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
UPDATE test_time_intervals SET duration = toIntervalSecond(120) WHERE event_date = toDate('2024-06-15');
SELECT event_date, duration, event_date + duration AS end_date FROM test_time_intervals;
SELECT toIntervalSecond(90) AS interval, toDate('2024-06-15') + toIntervalSecond(90) AS future_date;
